title: agropyron cristatum subsp. puberulum
intro: Agropyron cristatum subsp. puberulum, also known as the tufted hair-grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agropyron cristatum subsp. puberulum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
